message:
test(core): add COUNT(*)+SUM fast path separation tests and assertion helpers

Adds comprehensive test coverage for the combined COUNT(*)+SUM aggregate
fast path (bd-wwqen.4):

- New helper assert_count_star_sum_row() for validating COUNT+SUM result
  rows with clear error messages for both non-NULL and NULL SUM cases
- Tests covering: basic COUNT+SUM on integer columns, empty tables (COUNT=0,
  SUM=NULL), NULL-only columns, mixed NULL/non-NULL values, and verification
  that the fast path fires via hot_path_profile counters

These tests ensure the streaming aggregate optimization (step-per-row instead
of collect-then-compute) produces correct results across edge cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
